best_bet.reason: The warmest water of the day sits around 80 degrees here, combined with the most potential for wave action at 1 to 3 feet, making it the sweet spot for a comfortable swim and better conditions if you're hoping for anything more than a bath-tub ocean.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
